I'm,

Yeah, the fires aren't too close to us, luckily.
OK, well, that's good.

Doing OK.

I'm in, uh, I'm in freezing cold Milwaukee, Wisconsin, so
yay, oh goodness.

We got, uh, negative temperatures when we woke up this morning, so,
um, yeah.

I know you're super busy over there, so really appreciate, um, you hopping on here.

Um, so our full portfolio is about 83 properties with just over 3000 units stretching from San Diego to Los Angeles.
So we have a pretty good span of properties.
Um, my role is I'm actually vice president of training, recruiting, and employee development, so I'm just in charge of making sure that everybody's doing their jobs correctly.
Awesome.
I feel like that's a a pretty wide ranging um job description there.
Yeah,
yeah, to say the least,
awesome,
um.

OK, OK, that sounds good.
Um.
And on Google, I guess, um, how Are you the person that's overseeing like the, the Google profiles and like, you know, potentially posting on them, making sure the information is accurate
for the most part it would be, yeah, for the most part it would be the property managers would maintain their own properties on something like that.
OK.
That makes sense.
Um, well, great, I appreciate uh the insight there.

I'll go ahead and share my screen here and um I think we'll just run through like a, a quick demo, um, kind of show you some use cases and um how other folks in your neck of the woods are are utilizing our product and where it's benefiting them, um, get you some pricing and and get you out of here.
Does that sound good?
That's perfect.
Awesome, awesome.
Well that sounds, sounds good.
Um, so yeah, the, the reason behind our products, we essentially created Google Business Pro.
It's a product that um sort of automates and optimizes your Google process um across your portfolio.
Um, so we handle, um, first off, making sure your your profiles are accurate, um, we have uh daily posts that get automated through AI.

Essentially, uh, grabbing all information from your property websites, your PM software, and sort of reflecting your best amenities, um, photos, uh, information points, and doing a daily post to increase your online ranking, your SEO, your local ranking for Google.

Um, we also showcase available units onto your Google Business profiles, um, with an API feed from your PM software to your profile, uh, and then lastly we automate your Q&A sections to make sure that those are 100% accurate information up to date.
Um, and really the, the nice part about this is it saves you and your team a ton of time.

Um, it's something that's sort of set it and forget it for your property managers, um, and then you'll see some big turns in the, the SEO and web traffic to your property sites, and those are all data points and analytics that we send over, um, to you and your team on a monthly basis to ensure that what we're doing is indeed both saving you time and creating results for you.
Um, so we found like recently, um, last handful of years and especially heading into 2025, uh, your property profiles on Google are becoming just as important as your website.
Um, it just establishes your credibility, increases your reach, drives conversion, um, and really just gives the renter a great first impression.
Um, and that's not changing as we had in the 2025.

So, um, what we found, and this is coming right from Google, is that the four most important things, uh, and key takeaways for this year, um, are the consistency of the posts and the interaction with the profiles, um, customer engagements so uh responding to reviews in a timely manner, um, and then utilizing those Google posts, so regularly publishing posts on the profiles.
So those are all things that we're able to to do and and kind of automate for you.
Um, I know I just talked a lot there.
Is that, is that sort of what you expected to see jumping on this call, or I guess what were your expectations heading in here?
No, that was pretty much it.
It makes a lot of sense.
OK, um, well, great, that sounds good.
I, I pulled up a handful of our properties here that are using our services.
Um, I, I guess I should ask you this first, um, what property management software do you use there at CTM?
Youy.
Perfect, one of our preferred partners.
Uh, so we have a, a seamless API feed like essentially.

Yes, we just got that one.
Awesome, yeah, I saw it on uh I think it was on your featured properties page on here.

OK, um great looking building looks like it has some cool amenities, um, so I pulled that one up, um, so I, I just see from the jump, so like the the profile is claimed, like the information is accurate, the website links out correctly, so like you're you're checking all the the boxes to start out with.
What we can do is kind of take this experience to the next level um for you, uh, with the flip of a switch.

So I, I see back in August this might even be the previous ownership uh before you acquired it, but they were doing some like manual posting, um, they posted like a move in special, um, you know, uh, a couple of things here and there throughout the year.
This was back in April.
Um, but what we can do is kind of take that to the next level and automate a daily post that looks something like this.
OK.
So every single day, um, we'll go through and the AI will generate a new post, a unique sort of caption to it, using keywords and phrases that Google likes to see to increase your SEO ranking.

Um, the other cool thing we're able to do is that when your property managers, um, update, uh, move in special or if they have any concessions going on, the following day, that'll actually become a daily post, um, onto Google.
So like this is this, so Rise, they signed up there, I think they have 65 properties on with us, um, so this is just automated, so their PM.
They must have gone in, updated a special into Yardi, and then the following day it it spits it out onto Google as the Daily Post.
And this gets updated off of the property's website,
um, or
do they have to put the special into Yardi for it to roll over?
So the special in particular would be have to be uh into yardie.
OK.

We've been pretty good, uh, maintaining our occupancy, so it hasn't been needed, but normally specials are things that go on the websites or apartments.com, things like that, so.
OK.
Putting it into the yard would have to be something that um they would have to be taught.
Yeah, which is, which is fair and that's only just a a small sort of feature that we have, um, a lot.
Oh, I
love it.
I think it's great.
That's not a problem at all.
OK,
OK, cool.
Yeah, and it typically, you know, they'll run once a week as just a concession post if you're running them, um, but that's just a, a look at some of those posts.
Here's a different property, um, sometimes they'll showcase the floor plans.

Um, you know, your theater rooms, whatever sort of amenities you have stored in, in Yardi in your websites, like, we'll grab all that information and 365 times a year, make sure the post comes through, and that way we'll increase your SEO and traffic to your websites.
OK.

Um, so if there were units available at at the union here, it would actually showcase on the profile.
With the price point, um, and that gets updated every single day as long as the information is up to date and yardy.
OK.

So I just have a few floor plans available.
Um, this is a Uh
Sustained property, it's not a lease up.

From here you can look at more information, you can visit your website from here or call in, and these are all metrics that we're able to track for you and send over to you on a monthly basis to showcase like, hey, um, not only do these profiles look good, they're accurate, they're up to date, but we are getting traffic from from what we're doing for you.
Here's another look.

I guess is, is that something,

Um, just this one right here, the only question that we're seeing is, you know, do they take section 8?

You know, as of today, there were 3 bedroom units available, there were 2 bedroom units available, and so forth.
Um, and what we found is with doing this, um, you won't really find a whole lot of manual questions being asked because typically their questions are being answered.
Um, you'll still find it here and there, but it, it kind of lifts that issue off of your PM's plate, um, they won't have to go in and manually respond, um.
And it just enhances the the renter experience for everyone.
Here's another look at the property, so 10 hours ago.
You just see every morning we just kind of run through all of our customers um before your business hours and make sure that it's updated.
Any questions at all?
No.

Their Q&A wasn't automated, um, and the first year of working with us and having our tech on on their profiles, um, they saw 113% increase in phone calls, views, direction requests, website visits, and map views.

Just to show that what we're doing is indeed working and we're getting more traffic.
Over time to your property websites.
